data.name: High Fantasy: Hentai Tale
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Aethelgard City, a vast citadel, controlled by a benevolent queen, which takes in any and all refugees. As the former head alchemist of a kingdom that fell in flames, you must re-commence your life from zero in this society.

Lucky for you, you are the discoverer of a new type of magic: Lust Magic!

Use your spells to increase your influence and rise above your station, and in doing so improve your relationship with the women of the city! As you position yourself better socially, you will be able to unlock special bonds with the women you meet, and in turn have access to special sex scenes!

A medieval fantasy visual novel set in Aethelgard City, where you must harness your lust magic in order to become an influential figure in the kingdom. Get involved with beautiful women and uncover the mystery of your fallen kingdom as you reveal a city-wide conspiracy.

Game Features:

  • Obtain experience as you complete tasks for the women of the kingdom;

  • Level up by completing increasingly more difficult minigames;

  • With each level of Social Influence, you will unlock hotter sex scenes;

  • Delve yourself inside of a rich story that will surprise you at every turn!
data.about_the_game:
Welcome to Aethelgard City, a vast citadel, controlled by a benevolent queen, which takes in any and all refugees. As the former head alchemist of a kingdom that fell in flames, you must re-commence your life from zero in this society.

Lucky for you, you are the discoverer of a new type of magic: Lust Magic!

Use your spells to increase your influence and rise above your station, and in doing so improve your relationship with the women of the city! As you position yourself better socially, you will be able to unlock special bonds with the women you meet, and in turn have access to special sex scenes!

A medieval fantasy visual novel set in Aethelgard City, where you must harness your lust magic in order to become an influential figure in the kingdom. Get involved with beautiful women and uncover the mystery of your fallen kingdom as you reveal a city-wide conspiracy.

Game Features:

  • Obtain experience as you complete tasks for the women of the kingdom;

  • Level up by completing increasingly more difficult minigames;

  • With each level of Social Influence, you will unlock hotter sex scenes;

  • Delve yourself inside of a rich story that will surprise you at every turn!
data.short_description: A medieval fantasy visual novel where you must harness your lust magic in order to become an influential figure in the kingdom. Complete different levels of challenges to unlock special, deep relationships with the women you encounter, and uncover underlying life-threatening machinations.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Any modern processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU with OpenGL or DirectX 9 support
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU with OpenGL or DirectX 9 support
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Any modern Linux distribution
  • 處理器: 64-bit quad-core processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU that supports Vulkan
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
